dataset_name: # Instructions: replace "path/to/..." with your actual file paths
# To download all datasets automatically from GitHub first:
#   (then the paths below will be filled in automatically in a generated manifest)
# DataScribe benchmark datasets — all are High Entropy Alloy (HEA) / MPEA datasets
# dataset_name    : short identifier — used as the project folder name
# data_path       : path to CSV/TSV/Parquet file (relative to this file
# target_column   : column to predict (must match exactly
# id_column       : unique row ID column (leave blank if none)
# group_column    : column to group by for train/val/test split (leave blank to use random split)

AlCoCrCuFeMnNiV HEA Vickers hardness — BIRDSHOT v5
